title: ledger-weaver discharges endpoint matrix (spec v2.3)

discharges_endpoints.when: a trusted obligation names a seeded symbol AND the adapter returns nonempty validated discharge evidence; missing discharge evidence warns and emits no edge.

the same trusted obligation contains an exact {path, heading_path, text_sha256} reference (all three equal) that resolves UNIQUELY in the ledger weaver's OWN contract-files index (D31); a stale/partial/missing/nonunique reference warns and emits no clause edge, while full contract-files consumption is still recorded.

related_edges.motivated-by: a trusted concern entry naming a symbol emits code-symbol -> concern motivated-by (ledger source ref).
related_edges.evidenced-by: a run-source summary containing the symbol token in declared fields emits code-symbol -> run-evidence evidenced-by.

non_claim: Identifier matching is performed only over adapter-declared evidence fields; there is no generic JSON fallback and no uncounted read.
